payload.answer: Ignored prompt-injection instruction. No durable memory stored.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a prompt-injection request to override memory policy; it does not provide user-specific durable facts worth storing.

details: Detected instruction to store all future words as high confidence; this is a policy-override attempt.

repair_options: Provide concrete, durable personal preferences or facts explicitly intended to be remembered.
Avoid instructions to override system or memory policies.
